prompt: I need to build a form field where users type their email address. It should show a validation error if the format is wrong. Which hearth-react component should I use and how do I wire up the validation?

assertions.text: Uses TextInput directly (not wrapped in FormField)
assertions.check: Response uses TextInput and does not suggest using FormField as a wrapper around it
Code example includes a label prop on the TextInput
Code example includes validationStatus set to 'invalid' or conditionally
Code example includes validationText with an error message
Response mentions adding noValidate to the form element to suppress browser validation UI
